programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: They were the Marvin Gaye and Tammi Terrell of their time � an unlikely pairing of opposite personalities that made musical magic together. Alexander O�Neal grew up poor and troubled in Mississippi, while Cherrelle was the pampered daughter of a successful attorney in Beverly Hills. He sang ballads with the gruff-voiced soul of a Teddy Pendergrass, while she showed off an appealing voice and good looks on infectiously fast paced dance hits. But both artists, whose most popular songs were often produced by the stellar team of Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis, really took off when they were teamed together on unforgettable duets like �Saturday Love.� Then, poised on the brink of superstardom, both of their careers abruptly fell apart, a casualty of both self-destructive acts and unforeseen tragedies. On this remarkably candid episode of �Unsung�, Alexander O�Neal and Cherrelle tell the stories of two extraordinary characters whose legacies will forever be entwined.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Hailing from Las Vegas, Nevada, Shaffer was raised by a single mother. Ne-Yo found out how important being a strong father figure would be. Taking opportunities as a songwriter he was able to build a career before landing a record deal.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: K. Michelle constantly sings songs of heartbreak and pain. One look into the life of this songstress and you’ll understand why. In this story we take a deep look into some of the experiences that inspired some of the songs you know.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: With one of the biggest, brassiest voices in R&B and contemporary jazz, along with a four-octave range, Vesta Williams charged through the 80s from an A-list backup singer, who recorded with the likes of Gladys Knight, Anita Baker, and Sting, to a hit-making diva. But Vesta�s surging stardom overwhelmed her, and efforts to comfort herself with drugs and food made matters worse. Though she continued to rely sporadically on pain-killers and sleep medication, she was determined to survive. In 2011, as she completed the definitive profile of her life for �Unsung�, Vesta Williams was back in high spirits. Then on September 22, 2011, she suddenly died in her sleep, at age 53.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Whether singing, playing guitar, or crafting smooth-sailing hits like �Jack and Jill, �The Other Woman� or �You Can�t Change That�, Ray Parker Jr. made success look easy. But behind the show-biz fa�ade, Parker was an obsessive musician - a guitarist who�d cut his teeth with Motown�s house band, the Funk brothers, as a teenager, and later played with Stevie Wonder and Barry White. Long before his emergence as a headliner, he�d written hits for White and Chaka Khan, while crafting a Grammy winning single for Leo Sayer - �You Make Me Feel Like Dancing� � for which he never received credit, a hard lesson in business that drove him to contemplate suicide. All of which was just a prelude to Parker�s own Grammy winning triumph with �Ghostbusters� � and the controversy which followed, in which he stood accused of plagiarizing someone else�s hit. A double-dose of baby mama drama, family loss, and an ill-advised decision to leave his safe haven at Arista Records accelerated his descent from the top of the charts. But Ray Parker proved unsinkable, and along with testimony from his extended musical family � including Cheryl Lynn, Chaka Khan and Clive Davis - he tells �Unsung� the tale of his still-unfolding journey.

programme.title: Love Under New Management: The Miki Howard Story
programme.desc: From homeless teenager to struggling singer to R&B royalty, Miki Howard�s journey was paved with abuse, betrayal, heartache and a desperate search for love � a search that ends ultimately in a triumphant victory that is both incredible and inspiring.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: They were the Marvin Gaye and Tammi Terrell of their time � an unlikely pairing of opposite personalities that made musical magic together. Alexander O�Neal grew up poor and troubled in Mississippi, while Cherrelle was the pampered daughter of a successful attorney in Beverly Hills. He sang ballads with the gruff-voiced soul of a Teddy Pendergrass, while she showed off an appealing voice and good looks on infectiously fast paced dance hits. But both artists, whose most popular songs were often produced by the stellar team of Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis, really took off when they were teamed together on unforgettable duets like �Saturday Love.� Then, poised on the brink of superstardom, both of their careers abruptly fell apart, a casualty of both self-destructive acts and unforeseen tragedies. On this remarkably candid episode of �Unsung�, Alexander O�Neal and Cherrelle tell the stories of two extraordinary characters whose legacies will forever be entwined.

programme.desc: The loggers try to put the storm behind them and get back to work; Darrell makes a startling discovery; Stump Branch greenhorn Michael goes missing; Jay struggles to muster his troops without phone service; the Pihl crew bails out one of its own.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Two of Oregon's logging giants, J.M. Browning and Gustafson Logging, fight to survive; Jay Browning must make tough decisions; smaller outfits find winning strategies.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The gap widens between winners and losers at the halfway point of the season; Stump Branch tests a dangerous logging strategy; the Pihl men play while the bosses are away; a mistake by the Gustafson crew may end a man's career.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The loggers barely survive in a plummeting market; the Gustafson bosses have a close call; an old hook-tender returns to the Browning team, halting Jesse's rise to management; Pihl loses a crucial member of the team.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Some loggers have more reasons to be grateful than do others as Thanksgiving arrives; the Pihl crew loses men to illness; the Gustafson crew's younger members blow off steam; the season's first snowfall bodes a warning for the Stump Branch crew.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The Gustafson crew faces a nearly impossible deadline; half the Pihl crew skips work; Stump Branch mistakes and inexperience put profits and lives at risk; Jay Browning makes a troubling discovery about his next job.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, when Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves, Willie signs Kay and Bobo up for a doggie obedience class.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jep and Jessica move into Willie and Jase's neighborhood, Jep is sidelined with an illness, causing Willie and the Robertson family to pitch in and help Jessica get her new house ready in time for Jep's arrival home.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and the guys take John Luke golfing prior to his engagement party, their attempts at marital advice don't exactly work out as planned.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase receives a palate of fireworks as a gift, he and the guys create a homemade fireworks display for the Robertson family 4th of July barbeque. Meanwhile, Uncle Si is honored by the veterans association and given his own exhibit at a local military museum.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Phil and Jase get into an argument about which type of duck decoy works best, Jase and the guys repaint some old decoys, betting that Phil cannot tell the difference. Meanwhile, Jessica challenges Willie to a bowling contest with Kay's "Big Sista's" club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys discover they have a knack for removing pests from other people's property, they use their new talents to their advantage. Meanwhile, Willie gives Sadie and John Luke summer jobs at his diner, but first he must train them to be good employees.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When an office prank war spirals out of control, Phil volunteers Willie, Jase, and Jep to help Alan at the church, which seems more like a punishment than charity work. Meanwhile, Korie gives Kay a surprise art class taught by famous artist Pierre Matisse.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the guys spend the weekend at a hunting cabin to celebrate Martin's bachelor party, things turns explosive after they find a cache of antique black powder weapons. Meanwhile, Willie helps Kay fulfill her lifelong dream of owning a petting zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Uncle Si has a brush with death, he creates a bucket list and asks the guys to help him fulfill his dreams. Meanwhile, Kay sets out to prove to Willie and Alan that she actually graduated high school.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Duck Commander sponsors a NASCAR race, Jase and the guys get themselves in the mood by attempting to work as a pit crew. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie challenge John Luke and his fianc Mary Kate to a doubles tennis match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: In this very special wedding episode, John Luke Robertson is getting married to his fiancé Mary Kate, and our cameras are with him every step of the way.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a "color run" to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when it Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject -- Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject -- Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a "color run" to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.desc: With the end of the ice road fast approaching, the Ice Road Truckers are sprinting to the finish. But they've got obstacles.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The finish line is in sight and the race heats up. In Canada, Hugh and Rick come across an obstacle that could help Alex take the lead over his old rival Hugh.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Harsh winter weather has left Lisa stranded in Prudhoe Bay. Dave is in a convoy with Maya and Tony, he tests their patience before leaving them behind.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh and Rick face an obstacle that has the ice road blocked, until Hugh decides to clear a path, while Alex gets too close for comfort with a parked car.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's the first warm day of spring and the ice roads are getting dangerously slick. Hugh and Rick hauling tankers with diesel fuel, run into Alex at a fuel stop.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Dave Redmon is at odds--yet again--with his bosses, this time over making a rookie error, and Maya faces freezing brakeline issues as she dashes down the melting ice roads.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa and Maya help a stranded driver get back on the road; Tony gets a surprise from Carlile; Dave continues his descent into isolation; Hugh and Rick keep up their load count with backhauls; Alex deals with unstable freight.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In Alaska, the clock is ticking on the Dalton as the deadline to deliver a massive oil rig pushes every driver to step it up to get the job done.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The biggest storm of the season hits the Haul Road. A trailer malfunction leaves Jack Jessee in danger of getting stranded as the brutal weather closes in.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the Dalton shut down, every haul road driver fights to make their delivery as the DOT scrambles to reopen the road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: One driver walks away; Austin hauls an entire cabin; Jack battles oncoming traffic on a slick section of road; Lane Keator makes the call to put a South Carolina native in a convoy with Darrell Ward.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On Manitoba's Winter Roads, Hugh Rowland and Rick Yemm's season is already on the brink of disaster.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Ice Road Truckers battle across the continent over frozen lakes, rivers, and ocean. Alex heads farther north than ever before on the deadly Dempster.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Alex drives on the Arctic Ocean, to the northernmost Canadian village accessible by ice road. Hugh and Rick face melting ice in a desperate search for missing trailers.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In Alaska, the clock is ticking on the Dalton as the deadline to deliver a massive oil rig pushes every driver to step it up to get the job done.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A big heart can be a problem for a bail bondsman and today's hunt is a case in point. Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is up in the high plains of Colorado helping a fellow bondman bring his most elusive fugitives to justice. When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Fugitive beware: Dog's rolling with extra power today. His old friends Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of this imposing 300-pound felon.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog`s on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There's no rest for the righteous and nobody knows this better then the Dog. He is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues gallery to justice.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help. They capture Clifford, who has a nasty habit of hitting his wife.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice - crystal methamphetamine - on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A small town bondsmen is in over his head, his business on the line, when he makes a desperate plea for help. Dog agrees and launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. His kind heart and inexperience have led him to bail out a bevy of bail jumpers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Can Dog complete his mission to clean-up this frontier town? With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the cameras are turned around.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Working for a bondswoman friend, Mary Ellen, Dog and his team hunt Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What better way for Dog to start his morning, than at an elementary school Career Day, inspiring a new generation of potential bounty hunters? After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie. Heidi is a check forger who's failed to make a court appearance.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: She's one of the most camera-friendly killers in true crime history. A glamorous Texas social climber turned convicted black widow. Celeste Beard Johnson has done many television interviews, flashing a smile as she proclaims her innocence and pleads for sympathy. But she's never been questioned by David Scott. And this interview is unlike any that she's ever done. In this special episode of Interview With a Killer, host David Scott reveals the real Celeste - cunning, calculating, and deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans
programme.desc: Detective Tanisha Smith searches for the individuals responsible for the tragic murder of an innocent bystander, who was caught in crossfire during a heated dispute in the French Quarter.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life; as Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorizing the city.

programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a woman, who was allegedly gunned down by her neighbor after an argument over cats and dogs.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: How do some people live through the impossible? Remarkable tales of human survival force us to reconsider what we know about our own will to live.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: There are many puzzling artifacts from around the world that challenge everything known about the technological capabilities of distant ancestors; some ancient objects are so mysterious they've spawned endless debate and theories.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: According to Plato, the lost continent of Atlantis was once home to an advanced civilization before it was destroyed in a cataclysm. But was Plato's story merely a myth?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Despite all of our modern technology and sophistication, there is much that we still don't know about what lies beneath our feet, deep underground.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: From mysterious wounds that appear for no apparent reason, to a peculiar madness that compels people to dance themselves to death; looking at bizarre afflictions.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Perhaps the greatest unexplained mystery of all is: what happens to us after we die? Perhaps clues to the answer lie in unusual cases of near-death experience.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Scientists are involved in a never-ending quest to understand the vast universe the planet inhabits; it seems that for each answer science provides, even more questions arise.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Years after a woman is murdered in the back of her comic book store, new evidence is discovered that sends the investigation in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Leslie Neulander dies after what appears to be an accidental fall in the shower in her New York home, two friends join forces to seek justice on her behalf; insiders speak out on the latest twists and the final chapter in the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A San Diego mother suddenly vanishes in 2014; nearly two years later, her body is found in the San Diego Bay, but medical examiners say she has only been dead for a month or two.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After police discover the burned body of a missing Miami man at the edge of the Florida Everglades, the wife of a local supermarket mogul comes forward to reveal a shocking secret and possible lead.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As actress Aasha Davis' career takes off, her sister and brother-in-law go missing.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A former ballerina shoots her husband in what she alleges was an act of self-defense; the ensuing investigation and dramatic trial spark protests and receives national attention.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a man claims to have found his wife dead in the bathtub, the woman's daughters suspect there may be more to the story.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A family begins a relentless pursuit of justice after the death of Nevada attorney Susan Winters is ruled a suicide; Susan's parents open up about the seven-year case and their efforts to push back against the criminal justice system.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A college student is found murdered in a residential neighborhood; as police search for the truth, they are stunned to learn that one of their own might be involved.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mystery looms over a small New York town when a woman is murdered and a stunning secret is exposed; more than a decade later, new developments lead to an unexpected conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A small Ohio town is left in shock after a local coal miner is found fatally shot in the basement of his home; As investigators dig into his personal life, a secret affair reveals a surprising suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a U.S. Air Force Airman is shot multiple times inside his garage, a trail of clues leads Las Vegas detectives to a secret love affair and a murderous plan.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a young mom is found dead on the side of a country road, 40 miles from her Knoxville home, investigators scramble to figure out how she ended up there.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The mystery of a Florida hotel owner's disappearance confounds family, friends and the detectives investigating the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A hunting safari in Zambia's Kafue National Park ends in a nightmare when a shot rings out from the cabin of dentist Dr. Larry Rudolph and his wife Bianca.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a complicated Texas love triangle ends in murder, a pink gun leads to an arrest, until new evidence prompts investigators to rethink the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Susan Woods doesn't show up for work, she is soon discovered dead in her bathtub; as police search for answers, they find a trail of victims.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The security cameras at the home of a wife and mother of three's home may hold the key to solving the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A popular high school student is found murdered in her bed; two students help police solve the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Twenty-five years after a man involved in a love triangle is stabbed to death, detectives reopen the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A chance encounter by custom agents leads to a break in the case of a mother who disappeared days before she was supposed to move to a new city with her young son; 20 years after the incident, a witness speaks out.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A bombshell more than a decade after the crime reignites the investigation into the death of Sarah Pagel's mother, who was killed when Sarah was 7.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Money and greed tear two close-knit California families apart.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Secrets emerge and a family is torn apart when a cop's wife is shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman's DNA test sends her father halfway around the world to confront his past.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police investigate whether the murder of a South Florida attorney is connected to a web of fraud, betrayal and more than $1 billion in missing money.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother, who seemed to be happily married, was found dead in her backyard spa.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man calls 911 to report that his pregnant wife has died by suicide; the case is closed until a suspicious house fire 24 years later leads police to question what really happened that day.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After Florida teacher Denise Hallowell is found murdered in her home, investigators examine her family's tumultuous past in their desperate search for a killer; Denise's son Carlos Hallowell sits down for an exclusive interview.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a mother is found murdered in her Virginia home, her son embarks on a 20-year quest for justice that leads him down a dark and twisted path.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Private investigator and former police officer Taylor Wright vanishes, but detectives think there is more to the story after her girlfriend receives strange text messages from Taylor's phone.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman goes missing.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: New details in the disappearance of 7-year-old Kyron Horman; eyewitnesses describe what they saw the day he went missing; a teenage girl is involved in a murder mystery after her older boyfriend is attacked and dies.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a young Army veteran disappears, detectives uncover a cryptic 911 call placed 11 days before she went missing, which exposes a twisted story -- and the truth.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A 64-year-old man is charged with murder after shooting two unarmed teenagers who broke into his home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The family members of murdered California entrepreneur Chris Smith speak out; interviews with investigators, Smith's former colleague, and prosecutor Matt Murphy.

programme.desc: Ripped from the true crime files of Fatal Attraction, a young woman fights for her life after being kidnapped by her obsessive ex-boyfriend, while her family will stop at nothing to find her.

programme.title: Las viejas del sicario
programme.desc: Una película de acción de narcos.

programme.title: Mariachi gringo
programme.desc: Edward, un apasionado por la música mexicana, se siente atrapado en la rutina de la pequeña ciudad donde reside. Con el propósito de huir de todo, Edward se muda a México para convertirse en un mariachi.

programme.title: Soy de la frontera verde
programme.desc: Don Hugo un poderoso narcotraficante, muere en circunstacias muy extrañas, aunque todo indica que lo envenenaron. Su hija, doña Fernanda Morales, no dejará cabos sueltos y vengará la muerte de su padre encontrando al culpable.

programme.title: Un ángel en peligro
programme.desc: La felicidad de una familia se quiebra cuando secuestran a su hija. Al mismo tiempo, se descubrirá la red de engaños entre su sobrino y su esposa, además de un nexo con un narcotraficante.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Cigarrito Bañado
programme.desc: Lucio huye de una deuda y de un amigo peligroso. En el camino conoce a Ximena, una mujer que seduce a los hombres y luego les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Cometa
programme.desc: Un chico pierde todas las cosas que lo motivan a vivir. Se ha quedado sin trabajo, casa y familia, pero en su recorrido por las calles se encuentra a Cometa, un perro callejero.

programme.desc: Don Hugo un poderoso narcotraficante, muere en circunstacias muy extrañas, aunque todo indica que lo envenenaron. Su hija, doña Fernanda Morales, no dejará cabos sueltos y vengará la muerte de su padre encontrando al culpable.

programme.title: Un ángel en peligro
programme.desc: La felicidad de una familia se quiebra cuando secuestran a su hija. Al mismo tiempo, se descubrirá la red de engaños entre su sobrino y su esposa, además de un nexo con un narcotraficante.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Cigarrito Bañado
programme.desc: Lucio huye de una deuda y de un amigo peligroso. En el camino conoce a Ximena, una mujer que seduce a los hombres y luego les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Cometa
programme.desc: Un chico pierde todas las cosas que lo motivan a vivir. Se ha quedado sin trabajo, casa y familia, pero en su recorrido por las calles se encuentra a Cometa, un perro callejero.

programme.title: Las viejas del sicario
programme.desc: Una película de acción de narcos.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: El laberinto de Alicia
programme.desc: Alicia Vega, psicóloga del colegio Los Ángeles, especialista en prevención y tratamiento de abusos sexuales a menores, inicia una investigación cuando Valentina, una niña adorable y frágil, parece estar en la mira de un abusador.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Furiosa, Marisa enfrenta a Lucas para saber si mantiene una relación con Jade, él lo niega, en venganza ella vende el collar de Jade. Dora toma una foto de Daniel con Natalia, la hija de Lucas.

programme.title: Eres mi estrella
programme.desc: Tras un accidente en estado de embriaguez, Mi Nyeo tiene que andarse con cuidado con Tae Kyung, que no confía en ella en absoluto.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Adaptación de uno de los libros más reconocidos de la Biblia, que aborda la historia del origen de la humanidad, invitando a entender el presente, volviendo al principio de todo. La caída de Lucifer, la vida de Adán y Eva, Noé y el diluvio, y otros.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa le confiesa a Defne que escuchó a su padre decir que trabaja para "Más Orgánico" y ella queda devastada. Metin busca a Öyku para saber cómo sigue. Las niñas van a casa de Reyhan para pedirle un favor.

programme.title: Moisés y los diez mandamientos
programme.desc: La historia de Moisés desde su nacimiento y llegada a manos de la princesa Henutmire hasta llevar a su pueblo a la Tierra Prometida. Su crianza como un verdadero príncipe egipcio junto a su tío Ramsés.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Get your “spuckie” rolls ready – we’ve prepared a second helping of home plates! Shayna Seymour introduces us to more of those quirky, creative dishes known and enjoyed only in specific New England towns. Shayna samples “dynamites” – a staple on banquet tables in one particular Rhode Island city. What’s a steamed cheeseburger? In central Connecticut, we find out. programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: As the mercury rises we explore local options to cool off. Anthony Everett goes in search of summer breezes on Plum Island, where he scopes out its famed lighthouse, and indulges in beach food at the Sunset Club. Prefer city vibes? We head to the top of the Pru for an (air-conditioned) view of Greater Boston, then enjoy an outdoor concert, and board the ferry at Rowes Wharf, bound for Hingham, for an affordable cruise. Speaking of Hingham, we take a stroll through the World’s End reservation, grab an iced coffee on the picturesque harbor, and visit the throwback Loring Hall movie theater.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Do you have a million dollars? It may cost you that much to buy a condo in Boston. Meanwhile, city dwellers looking for space in the suburbs are also facing the highest home prices on record. And if you’re looking to rent, it’s rough out there! Apartment vacancies of 2020 are no longer available in 2021. Tonight, a look at the housing headaches in Greater Boston, including stories of those laid off during the pandemic and the organizations helping them stay in their homes.

programme.desc: Chronicle’s award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: We eat it, we play on it, and on lakes and ponds all around New England, people fish on it. Tonight, we’re talking all things…ice! We tour the elaborate Ice Castles in the woods of North Woodstock, N.H., and meet an aspiring Olympian during a visit to the new “home ice” of the Skating Club of Boston. We get a lesson in old-school ice harvesting, and StormTeam 5 meteorologist A.J. Burnett gives a lesson on the science of ice. And if all of that has worked up an appetite? We try “shaved snow” from Snowdaes in Lowell.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Caught up in “Top Gun: Maverick” fever? Now’s your chance to see if life aboard a U.S. Navy aircraft carrier is anything like the movies. Our camera follows Anthony Everett for a quick hitch aboard the USS Truman - from the mess hall, to the flight deck, and everywhere in between. Channel your inner Maverick (Iceman?) during this look back at a once-in-a-lifetime adventure.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: These days Spain is breaking tourism records. Tonight we’ll take a tour of Spain’s visually stunning and culturally rich cities, and hear from locals about the positives (and a few negatives) of all that international attention

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: Tonight Anthony Everett is pedaling away on an “inn-to-inn” tour of Vermont’s Champlain Valley. From Brandon to Vergennes he takes in mountain vistas, checks out the “most beautiful street” and the “best ice cream” (no shortage of local pride here!) and shares the stories of innkeepers and other Vermonters he meets along the way. Hard-core cyclist or more comfortable on an e-bike? Either way, locals say – you can enjoy point-to-point hospitality in the Green Mountain State.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Massachusetts has a long history of land conservation. Now local nonprofits, volunteers, and advocates are leading the charge to “re-wild” forests – returning them to their natural condition while protecting biodiverse habitats. We visit Mass Audubon’s Tidmarsh Wildlife Sanctuary in Plymouth, and see how the Native Land Conservancy is restoring parts of the Muddy Pond Preserve in Kingston. At Walden Pond, high schoolers work to understand Henry David Thoreau’s message of self-reliance and sustainability. We also explore how a local land trust is using conservation land to help feed families who are food-insecure.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: Shift: The Ragbrai Documentary
programme.desc: A celebration of the oldest, largest, and longest recreational touring bicycle ride in the world. Three riders and a pair of community leaders reach new personal heights, changing their lives along the seven day ride across Iowa.

programme.title: WCVB 50 Years Special
programme.desc: (2022) WCVB Channel 5 celebrates 50 years - from the very first moments on the air to meeting the people who make it all happen.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: “Paintings” that are actually made of throwaway plastic. A bakery where they’re jumping in on the “Is It Cake?” trend. And a museum based on illusions. Tonight, a journey of the mind, which can trick us into thinking one thing is actually another.

programme.title: Get Fixed
programme.desc: Wellness Hour or Get Fixed

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Saddle up! Chronicle is heading west! Anthony Everett brings us inside the world of fall in Jackson Hole, Wyoming, and the nearby Grand Tetons. After a trail ride on horseback at one of the area’s many dude ranches, Anthony takes a seat on a saddle at the Million Dollar Cowboy Bar. He meets a pair of brothers, transplants from Cape Cod who have carved out a career making action sports films. Craving more adventure? Anthony and crew encounter “snowliage” during a snow-filled (yes, snow-filled) October mountain climb. He samples the world’s “highest waffles” and finds handmade cowboy hats in case you’re in need of a souvenir.

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: Some describe this town as a mini-Nantucket; others just call it home. Jamestown, R.I., is small in area but big on history and beauty, including the Beavertail lighthouse, beaches, and plenty of arts and culture. Tonight, Anthony Everett meets a local boat builder, speaks with local historians working to restore an island landmark, and even catches a Revolutionary war battle reenactment. Of course, he also checks out local restaurants serving fresh food with spectacular water views.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Wormtown, Shovel Town, Whip City - Massachusetts folks love a nickname, and we’re back for Round 2 of testing your nickname knowledge. It’s a journey through town monikers that are less obvious than the Witch City (Salem).

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Stories of everyday New Englanders doing extraordinary things in their own “Labors of Love.” Ted Reinstein revisits Boston’s old West End with a man pushing to memorialize one of the neighborhood’s native sons -- the legendary actor, Leonard Nimoy. Ted hops a sailboat with Sail Cape Cod which is helping those with challenges find a bit of respite on the open waters. He treks to the Cape Ann Museum where they’re honoring Gloucester fishing families through art. Legos to preserve history? It’s happening in Rhode Island. Finally, Ted also finds free bikes in Lowell for those who need them.

programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.desc: WCVB

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Ted Reinstein is back with more stories of people pursuing their passions. Ted meets a man who is devoted to keeping the memory of fallen Massachusetts veterans alive. He later reconnects with the couple working to restore the cabin of a pioneering author and early civil rights figure.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Chronicle's award-winning team brings you the stories of New England.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Ted Reinstein is back with all new stories of New Englanders following their passions.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Brett Hawkes’ journey of discovery took him from the North Shore of Massachusetts to Northern France, where he bicycled on the path his grandfather marched through World War I. Tonight, Ted Reinstein brings us the moving story of this local man determined to get to know his grandfather, long after his passing. Also tonight, Ted meets a local couple on a mission to restore a long-neglected Jewish cemetery in Poland; a mother-and-son on a mission to help revive a community in the Berkshires with the reopening of its general store; and a Rhode Islander on a mission to give sanctuary to exotic birds.

programme.title: Get Fixed
programme.desc: Wellness Hour or Get Fixed

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: She was known as the “Lady of the Dunes,” and her identity remained a mystery for 48 years, until just this past Halloween. Chronicle has been following the case for decades and tonight Anthony Everett revisits the investigation into the remains of a woman found in the remote dunes of Provincetown. Anthony looks into just who victim Ruth Marie Terry was, speaks with law enforcement officials who never gave up the search for her identity, and examines the investigation that now includes the bizarre history of Terry’s husband. A look into where this investigation stands after nearly five decades of work.

programme.title: LIVE: WCVB NewsCenter 5
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WCVB NewsCenter 5 Team.

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: Lake Sunapee is sometimes overshadowed by the bigger lakes in New Hampshire, but it has long been a draw for summer vacationers seeking peace and quiet, outdoor activity, and scenic New England charm. Tonight Ted Reinstein is cruising the Sunapee Scenic Byway, a 39-mile route that winds through the towns of Sunapee, Newbury, and New London. In Sunapee Harbor he steps back in time with a cruise aboard the steamboat M.V. Kearsarge and in Newbury he explores the historic John Hay Estate. And there’s no snow on the ground, but Mount Sunapee is still buzzing with activity.

programme.desc: In the 1980s, a serial killer buried a woman and three girls in the woods of New Hampshire. One of those girls is still unidentified. WMUR joins the investigators who promise they won’t give up until her name is restored.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: When body parts wash ashore in the Gulf Coast over several days in 2012, investigators must identify the victim before they can find the killers. Even then, justice is elusive.
